rows.label: tev016001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Bernat about the laborers
in the industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Bernat if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Bernat about the recently
discovered xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Bernat for his opinion of
the xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Bernat about the state of the war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016002_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Bernat about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Most of the physically capable
young folk end up joining BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0002
rows.name:
As a result, there's a real shortage of
laborers to do construction work in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0003
rows.name:
When they said they found 10 new
crew members, we thought they'd
send at least one of them our way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0004
rows.name:
But besides you, we haven't
seen hide nor hair of any of
'em! What the hell is going on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, regardless, if you get
disillusioned with BLADE, know
that we'd be happy to have you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0006
rows.name:
You could help us build the
industrial district of tomorrow
using good, honest manual labor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0021
rows.name:
You mean those Bias? I hear they
have BLADE blood on their hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0022
rows.name:
Depending on what happens, we may
need to go to war with their kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0023
rows.name:
How ironic. We drop in on this planet
uninvited, and now WE might be the
ones invading another world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0024
rows.name:
It's awful, when you think about it. But if that's
the way it's gotta be, then that's the way it's
gotta be— because Mira is all we have left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Even if they tell us to get the hell
off their planet, where else would we
go? We gotta fight to keep Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0040
rows.name:
You say xenoforms, and I think of
the bastards that destroyed Earth.
I figured they were all that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0041
rows.name:
But the xenoforms that came to this
city are... Well, they have quirks,
but they're an interesting bunch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0042
rows.name:
As we've been losing a lot of BLADEs over the
course of time, the city's grown quieter. It's
kinda nice to have so much energy back in NLA again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0057
rows.name:
A lot of BLADEs have been
cut down by Growth gunfire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0058
rows.name:
It's true that we may be able to bring
them back if we find the Central Life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0059
rows.name:
But there's no guarantee that
we'll find it before the rest
of us kick the bucket.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0060
rows.name:
If it comes down to it, I'm ready to
go down fighting in my Blue Blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG0061
rows.name:
You just tell me when things get bad,
okay? I'll go straight from the
construction site to the battlefield![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG1001
rows.name:
We're building again, and that means
doing my own job while also teaching
Rock the basics of construction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG1002
rows.name:
He seems pretty excited about getting
to the point where he could build
a house for him and Celica.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG1003
rows.name:
He's a quick study. If he keeps
working hard, I think he's got
the makings of a good builder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG1004
rows.name:
That's still a ways off though. Ryou
just wants him to get to the point where
he can draw a workable blueprint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016001_MSG1005
rows.name:
If he does that, we'll all chip
in and build the place for him.[ST:wait ]
